usage: setSpecialRouteType [-help] -setType {BLOCKRING BLOCKAGEWIRE BLOCKWIRE COREWIRE DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC FILLWIRE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE NOTYPE PADRING RING STRIPE} [-stopLayer <Metal_layer>] -stopTypeList {swire_type_list} [-bumpCell <bumpCellList> | -instPin {{inst1 pin1} {inst2 pin2}...}]

options.name: -setType
options.description: {BLOCKRING BLOCKAGEWIRE BLOCKWIRE COREWIRE DRCFILL FILLWIREOPC FILLWIRE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE NOTYPE PADRING RING STRIPE} specifies wire type to the marked special wire

options.name: -stopTypeList
options.description: specifies the special-wire types to mark
